regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Wellington typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Wellington rates are among the highest in NZ — budget 5–15% above the national average. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
